page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a thread-per-core ratio of 1.0, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead and providing predictable compute performance for demanding workloads.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio aligns with compute-intensive application requirements. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 80 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high network throughput offer a dense compute profile without the resource contention typical of shared-core or hyperthreaded environments. This makes the instance suitable for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance, such as high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and compute-heavy web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring predictable, non-hyperthreaded performance. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. It delivers a high baseline network bandwidth of 80 Gbps. This hardware profile is engineered for compute-heavy tasks requiring consistent processing power and high network throughput, such as batch processing, scientific simulations, and intensive web serving, offering a resource-dense compute architecture without hyperthreading overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 80 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable, non-hyperthreaded workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized instance with high-speed 80 Gbps networking for predictable, non-hyperthreaded processing workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
